summary: expense-untagged --auto-fix refreshes the expenses table first so it cannot overwrite categories a user set in the Zoho UI since the last sync.
reason: Without the refresh, the local store can be up to cache.stale_after hours old. A user who tagged an expense manually in Zoho since the last sync still appears category_id= locally, and --auto-fix PUTs the merchant-memory category onto it, silently overwriting the manual choice. Plain listing (no --auto-fix) keeps the normal freshness policy because stale data is acceptable for review. Filed per Greptile P1.
